name: Agentshire
description: OpenClaw plugin for building a living 3D town with social NPCs, a map editor, a character workshop, and citizen spatial-aware AI tools.

agentshire.label: Agentshire
agentshire.description: 小镇 WebSocket / HTTP 端口与自动启动配置

wsPort.description: WebSocket port for town frontend connection

townPort.description: HTTP port to serve the town frontend

autoLaunch.description: Automatically open town in browser on start

password.description: 保留字段：是否启用密码登录现统一由环境变量 AGENTSHIRE_TOWN_PASSWORD 决定（非空则必须密码登录，未设置则免密直进）。该配置字段保留但不再作为鉴权密码来源。

autoLaunch.description: Automatically open town in browser on start
